Cryozoo - Mammals tree Binninda-Emonds

##
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(treedataverse)
library(magrittr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(readxl)

## plotting options
theme_set(theme_bw())


here::here()
[1] "C:/Users/U216376/My Drive/Projects/Cryozoo/Cryozoo_project"
path<-here::here()

Binninda-Emonds

match with tree annotation (tip.lables)

# Mammalian supertree fron Binninda Edmonds et al. 2007
library(ggtree)

mammaltree<-read.tree(paste0(path,"/data/mammaltree.txt"))

mammaltree$tip.label[1:10]
 [1] "Tachyglossus_aculeatus"   "Zaglossus_bruijni"        "Ornithorhynchus_anatinus" "Anomalurus_beecrofti"     "Anomalurus_derbianus"    
 [6] "Anomalurus_pelii"         "Anomalurus_pusillus"      "Zenkerella_insignis"      "Idiurus_macrotis"         "Idiurus_zenkeri"

subset tree for cryozoo species


summary_species<-readRDS(paste0(path,"/output/Species_List_with_genome_and_cl_info2.rds")) %>%
  filter(superclass=="Mammalia") %>% 
  mutate(selected=if_else(cat=="Both","selected","FALSE")) %>% 
  mutate(orders_num=as.integer(as.factor(order)))

summary_species$tree_BE<-summary_species$species_%in%mammaltree$tip.label

table(summary_species$tree_BE)

FALSE  TRUE 
   15    85 
summary_species[!(summary_species$species_%in%mammaltree$tip.label),"species_"]

summary_species %<>%  
  mutate(alternative_name=if_else(is.na(alternative_name),species,alternative_name),
         scientific_name2=species,
         species=if_else(tree_BE,species,alternative_name),
         alternative_name=if_else(tree_BE,alternative_name,scientific_name2),
         species_=gsub(species,pattern = " ",replacement = "_"))

summary_species$tree_BE<-summary_species$species_%in%mammaltree$tip.label

table(summary_species$tree_BE)

FALSE  TRUE 
   13    87 
summary_species[!(summary_species$species_%in%mammaltree$tip.label),"species_"]

#Lets drop those species for now

selection_tree<-drop.tip(mammaltree, mammaltree$tip.label[!mammaltree$tip.label %in%
                                                      summary_species$species_ ])

selection_cryozoo<-summary_species[summary_species$species_%in%
                                      selection_tree$tip.label,]

selection_cryozoo<-selection_cryozoo[match(selection_tree$tip.label,selection_cryozoo$species_),]
pos<-which(colnames(selection_cryozoo)=="species_")
selection_cryozoo<-selection_cryozoo[,c(pos,1:(pos-1),(pos+1):ncol(selection_cryozoo))]

table(selection_tree$tip.label==selection_cryozoo$species_)

TRUE 
  85 


tree<-ggtree(selection_tree, color="grey60", lwd=0.5, mrsd = "01/08/2023")+
  ggtree::theme_tree2()

selection_cryozoo %>% mutate(cat=factor(cat,levels=rev(c("No Genome\n No Fibro","Fibro","Genome","Both"))))

cols<-colorRampPalette(brewer.pal("RdPu",n = 9)[-c(1:3)])(length(unique(selection_cryozoo$order)))

tree2<-tree %<+% selection_cryozoo+
  geom_tippoint(aes(color=order), size=2)+
  geom_tiplab(size=3)+
  theme(legend.position = c(0.1,0.8))+
  scale_colour_manual(values = cols)+
  xlim(NA,15)+
  xlab("divergence time (MYA)")


tree2


select_tree_ord<-tree$data[which(tree$data$isTip),]

desiredOrder  <- select_tree_ord[order(select_tree_ord$y),]$label

selection_cryozoo$sort_order<-match(selection_cryozoo$species_, desiredOrder)
selection_cryozoo<-arrange(selection_cryozoo,sort_order)

Combine with cryozoo metadata

### plot number of individuals

available_bar<-ggplot(selection_cryozoo)+
  geom_col(aes(y=reorder(species_,sort_order),x=fibro,fill=order))+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0,-1), "cm"),
        plot.background = element_blank())+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.y=element_blank())+
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols)+
  xlab("# of Fibroblasts")+
  ylab("")+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0:9))



plot_grid(nrow=1,tree2,
                 available_bar,
                 rel_widths = c(0.5,0.15),align = "hv",axis = "tb")


# ggsave(plot_grid(nrow=1,select_tree,
#                  available_bar,
#                  fibro_point,
#                  rel_widths = c(0.5,0.15,0.15)),
#        filename = "availability_tree.pdf",
#        path="C:/Users/Lucas/Desktop/",
#        device = "pdf",
#        width = 240,
#        height = 400,
#        units = "mm",
#        
#       )

Add heatmap to tree



# tree<-ggtree(selection_tree, layout="circular", lwd=0.5)
# 
# tree<-tree %<+% selection_cryozoo+
#   geom_tippoint(aes(color=order), size=2)

rownames(selection_cryozoo)<-NULL

selection_cryozoo[duplicated(selection_cryozoo$species_),]

 mat_sel<-selection_cryozoo %>% 
   ungroup() %>% 
   filter(!(duplicated(species_))) %>% 
   mutate(fibro=fibro_l,
          replicates=individuals>1,
          zoonomia=if_else(zoonomia,"Zoonomia","FALSE")) %>% 
   dplyr::select(species_,fibro,genome,replicates,selected,zoonomia) %>%
   column_to_rownames("species_") %>% 
   as.matrix
 

heatmap.colours <- c("purple","darkblue","grey75","red")

names(heatmap.colours) <- c("selected","TRUE","FALSE","Zoonomia")

 tree_map<-gheatmap(tree2,mat_sel, width=.2, offset=35, colnames=T,legend_title = "",
          colnames_position = "top",colnames_angle = 90,colnames_offset_y = 6,font.size = 4)   +
   scale_fill_manual(values=heatmap.colours,
                     na.value = "grey75",limits=force)+
   ylim(NA,100)+
   xlim(NA,70)+
   labs(colour="",fill="",shape="")+
   theme(legend.position = c(0.3,0.9))+
   theme(legend.direction = "horizontal")+
   theme(legend.text = element_text(size=7))+
   guides(fill=guide_legend(order = 2,reverse = -1))
Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.Scale for y is already present.
Adding another scale for y, which will replace the existing scale.Scale for x is already present.
Adding another scale for x, which will replace the existing scale.
   
tree_map
